  • Jerez, J. M., Molina, I., García-Laencina, P. J., Alba, E., Ribelles, N., Martín, M., & Franco, L. (2010). Missing data imputation using statistical and machine learning methods in a real breast cancer problem. Artificial Intelligence in Medicine, 50(2), 105–115. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.artmed.2010.05.002. 〔在真實乳癌資料比較統計與機器學習插補方法。〕
  • 框架 · Adamson, B., Liu, W., Duffield, S., et al. (2026). Transportability Analyses in Comparative Effectiveness Research: A Conceptual Framework and Methodological Principles Endorsed by the International Society for Pharmacoepidemiology (ISPE). Pharmacoepidemiology and Drug Safety, 35, e70396. 〔ISPE 提出可移轉性分析的概念架構。〕
  • Inoue, K., & Hsu, W. (2024). Transportability Analysis — A Tool for Extending Trial Results to a Representative Target Population (Invited Commentary, Oncology). 〔將試驗結果外推至目標族群的腫瘤學評論。〕
  • 估計與理論 · Westreich, D., Edwards, J. K., Lesko, C. R., Stuart, E., & Cole, S. R. (2017). Transportability of Trial Results Using Inverse Odds of Sampling Weights. American Journal of Epidemiology, 186(8), 1010–1014. 〔以逆抽樣勝算權重進行可移轉性的經典方法。〕
  • Dahabreh, I. J., Robertson, S. E., Steingrimsson, J. A., Stuart, E. A., & Hernán, M. A. (2020). Extending inferences from a randomized trial to a new target population. Statistics in Medicine, 39(14), 1999–2014. 〔將隨機試驗推論延伸至新目標族群的方法。〕
  • Bareinboim, E., & Pearl, J. (2016). Causal inference and the data-fusion problem. PNAS, 113(27), 7345–7352. 〔因果推論與資料融合問題的理論基礎。〕
  • Zuo, S., Josey, K. P., Raghavan, S., Yang, F., Juárez-Colunga, E., & Ghosh, D. (2022). Transportability Methods for Time-to-Event Outcomes. JCO Clinical Cancer Informatics, 6, e2200088. 〔針對存活時間結果的可移轉性方法。〕
  • 搬動預測模型（⑤） · Song, X., Yu, A. S. L., Kellum, J. A., et al. (2020). Cross-site transportability of an explainable AI model for acute kidney injury prediction. Nature Communications, 11, 5668. 〔可解釋 AKI 預測 AI 模型的跨院可移轉性研究。〕
  • Zang, C., Hou, Y., Lyu, D., et al. (2024). Accuracy and transportability of machine learning models for adolescent suicide prediction. Translational Psychiatry, 14. 〔青少年自殺預測機器學習模型的準確度與可移轉性。〕
  • 外部對照（外部對照分頁） · International Council for Harmonisation. ICH E10: Choice of Control Group and Related Issues in Clinical Trials (2000). 〔ICH E10 指引：臨床試驗對照組選擇相關議題。〕
  • Pocock, S. J. (1976). The combination of randomized and historical controls in clinical trials. Journal of Chronic Diseases, 29(3), 175–188. 〔Pocock 提出隨機與歷史對照合併的準則。〕
  • Schmidli, H., Gsteiger, S., Roychoudhury, S., O'Hagan, A., Spiegelhalter, D., & Neuenschwander, B. (2014). Robust meta-analytic-predictive priors in clinical trials with historical control information. Biometrics, 70(4), 1023–1032. 〔穩健統合分析預測先驗（MAP 先驗）方法論。〕
  • Burcu, M., Dreyer, N. A., Franklin, J. M., et al. (2020). Real-world evidence to support regulatory decision-making for medicines: considerations for external control arms. Pharmacoepidemiology and Drug Safety, 29(10), 1228–1235. 〔真實世界證據作外部對照組的法規考量。〕
  • Jahanshahi, M., Gregg, K., Davis, G., et al. (2021). The use of external controls in FDA regulatory decision making. Therapeutic Innovation & Regulatory Science, 55, 1019–1035. 〔FDA 法規決策中使用外部對照的實例分析。〕
  • Loiseau, N., et al. (2022). External control arm analysis: an evaluation of propensity score approaches, G-computation, and doubly debiased machine learning. BMC Medical Research Methodology, 22, 335. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12874-022-01799-z. 〔外部對照臂中傾向分數、G-計算與雙重去偏機器學習之評估。〕
  • Dai, C.-S., Ying, C., Ning, Y., & Zhao, J. (2025). Incorporating external controls for estimating the average treatment effect on the treated with high-dimensional data. arXiv:2509.20586. 〔高維度資料下納入外部對照、兼顧雙重穩健的 ATT 估計。〕
  • Ogier du Terrail, J., Klopfenstein, Q., Li, H., Mayer, I., Loiseau, N., Hallal, M., et al. (2025). FedECA: federated external control arms for causal inference with time-to-event data in distributed settings. Nature Communications, 16. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-62525-z. 〔分散式存活資料因果推論的聯邦式外部對照臂。〕
  • 方法與報告（系統性回顧分頁） · Higgins, J. P. T., Thomas, J., Chandler, J., Cumpston, M., Li, T., Page, M. J., & Welch, V. A. (Eds.) (2024). Cochrane Handbook for Systematic Reviews of Interventions (v6.5). Cochrane. cochrane.org/authors/handbooks-and-manuals. 〔Cochrane 系統性回顧的權威方法手冊，介入性研究回顧的標準指引。〕
  • Page, M. J., McKenzie, J. E., Bossuyt, P. M., et al. (2021). The PRISMA 2020 statement: an updated guideline for reporting systematic reviews. BMJ, 372, n71. 〔PRISMA 2020 報告聲明，規範系統性回顧與統合分析的透明報告。〕
  • 合併與異質性 · DerSimonian, R., & Laird, N. (1986). Meta-analysis in clinical trials. Controlled Clinical Trials, 7(3), 177–188. 〔提出隨機效應統合分析的經典 DerSimonian-Laird 估計法。〕
  • Higgins, J. P. T., Thompson, S. G., Deeks, J. J., & Altman, D. G. (2003). Measuring inconsistency in meta-analyses. BMJ, 327, 557–560 (I²). 〔提出 I² 指標以量化統合分析中研究間的異質性。〕
  • Egger, M., Davey Smith, G., Schneider, M., & Minder, C. (1997). Bias in meta-analysis detected by a simple, graphical test. BMJ, 315, 629–634. 〔提出 Egger 檢定，以漏斗圖回歸偵測發表偏誤。〕
  • Harrer, M., Cuijpers, P., Furukawa, T. A., & Ebert, D. D. (2021). Doing Meta-Analysis with R: A Hands-On Guide. CRC Press. doing-meta.guide. 〔以 R 實作統合分析的實用入門指南。〕
  • Barker, T. H., Migliavaca, C. B., Stein, C., Colpani, V., Falavigna, M., Aromataris, E., & Munn, Z. (2021). Conducting proportional meta-analysis in different types of systematic reviews: a guide for synthesisers of evidence. BMC Medical Research Methodology, 21, 189. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12874-021-01381-z. 〔說明如何執行比例型（單組盛行率）統合分析的方法指引。〕
  • 證據強度（GRADE） · Guyatt, G. H., Oxman, A. D., Vist, G. E., et al. (2008). GRADE: an emerging consensus on rating quality of evidence and strength of recommendations. BMJ, 336, 924–926. 〔提出 GRADE 系統以評定證據品質與建議強度的共識文件。〕
  • Guyatt, G., Oxman, A. D., Akl, E. A., et al. (2011). GRADE guidelines: 1. Introduction. Journal of Clinical Epidemiology, 64(4), 383–394. gradeworkinggroup.org. 〔GRADE 系列指引第一篇，介紹其架構與應用。〕
  • 因果機器學習（Causal ML 分頁） · Feuerriegel, S., Frauen, D., Melnychuk, V., et al. (2024). Causal machine learning for predicting treatment outcomes. Nature Medicine, 30, 958–968. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41591-024-02902-1. 〔因果機器學習預測治療結果的醫學綜述。〕
  • Künzel, S. R., Sekhon, J. S., Bickel, P. J., & Yu, B. (2019). Metalearners for estimating heterogeneous treatment effects using machine learning. PNAS, 116(10), 4156–4165. 〔提出估計異質處理效應的元學習器（meta-learners）框架。〕
  • Wager, S., & Athey, S. (2018). Estimation and inference of heterogeneous treatment effects using random forests. JASA, 113(523), 1228–1242 (causal forests / grf). 〔提出因果森林，以隨機森林估計異質處理效應。〕
  • Nie, X., & Wager, S. (2021). Quasi-oracle estimation of heterogeneous treatment effects. Biometrika, 108(2), 299–319 (R-learner). 〔提出 R-learner，準神諭估計異質處理效應。〕
  • Chernozhukov, V., Chetverikov, D., Demirer, M., et al. (2018). Double/debiased machine learning for treatment and structural parameters. The Econometrics Journal, 21(1), C1–C68. 〔提出雙重／去偏機器學習的因果推論框架。〕
  • Kaddour, J., Lynch, A., Liu, Q., Kusner, M. J., & Silva, R. (2022). Causal Machine Learning: A Survey and Open Problems. arXiv:2206.15475. 〔因果機器學習的綜述與待解問題整理。〕
  • Li, S., & Chu, Z. (Eds.) (2023). Machine Learning for Causal Inference. Springer. 〔匯整因果推論機器學習方法的編輯專書。〕
  • Feng, J., Kothari, A., Vossler, P., Bishara, A., Zier, L., Addo, N., Kornblith, A., Tan, Y. S., & Singh, C. (2026). Human-AI co-design for clinical prediction models. npj Digital Medicine. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41746-026-02838-5. 〔HACHI：以 AI 代理人與專家迭代協作、從臨床文字建構完全可解讀的臨床預測模型的框架。〕
  • 孟德爾隨機化（MR 分頁） · Davey Smith, G., & Ebrahim, S. (2003). 'Mendelian randomization': can genetic epidemiology contribute to understanding environmental determinants of disease? International Journal of Epidemiology, 32(1), 1–22. 〔替孟德爾隨機化命名並奠立框架的論文。〕
  • Burgess, S., Butterworth, A., & Thompson, S. G. (2013). Mendelian randomization analysis with multiple genetic variants using summarized data. Genetic Epidemiology, 37(7), 658–665. 〔兩樣本 MR 的反變異加權（IVW）估計式。〕
  • Bowden, J., Davey Smith, G., & Burgess, S. (2015). Mendelian randomization with invalid instruments: effect estimation and bias detection through Egger regression. International Journal of Epidemiology, 44(2), 512–525. 〔MR-Egger：截距不為 0 可偵測方向性多效性。〕
  • Hemani, G., Zheng, J., Elsworth, B., et al. (2018). The MR-Base platform supports systematic causal inference across the human phenome. eLife, 7, e34408 (the TwoSampleMR package). 〔MR-Base／TwoSampleMR，標準的兩樣本 MR 工具鏈。〕
  • Richmond, R. C., & Davey Smith, G. (2022). Mendelian randomization: concepts and scope. Cold Spring Harbor Perspectives in Medicine, 12(1), a040501. https://doi.org/10.1101/cshperspect.a040501. 〔孟德爾隨機化概念與適用範圍的綜述。〕
  • Davies, N. M., Holmes, M. V., & Davey Smith, G. (2018). Reading Mendelian randomisation studies: a guide, glossary, and checklist for clinicians. BMJ, 362, k601. https://doi.org/10.1136/bmj.k601. 〔臨床醫師閱讀 MR 研究的指南、詞彙表與查核清單。〕
  • Legault, M.-A., Hartford, J., Arsenault, B. J., Yang, A. Y., & Pineau, J. (2025). A flexible machine learning Mendelian randomization estimator applied to predict the safety and efficacy of sclerostin inhibition. The American Journal of Human Genetics, 112(6), 1344–1362. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ajhg.2025.04.010. 〔Quantile IV：假設極少的彈性機器學習 MR 估計式。〕
  • Lin, S.-C., Lin, S.-H., Ge, T., Chen, C.-Y., & Lin, Y.-F. (2025). Causal mediation analysis: a summary-data Mendelian randomization approach. Statistics in Medicine, 44(6), e10317. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.10317. 〔以彙總資料 MR 進行因果中介分析的方法。〕
  • 數位孿生（數位孿生分頁） · Schuler, A., Walsh, D., Hall, D., et al. (2022). Increasing the efficiency of randomized trial estimates via linear adjustment for a prognostic score (PROCOVA). The International Journal of Biostatistics. 〔PROCOVA：以預後分數（數位孿生）做共變項調整，讓 RCT 估計更精準。〕
  • Chen, J., Eapen, S., Walsh, D., et al. — Unlearn.AI digital-twin (prognostic) approach to external/synthetic control arms and prognostic covariate adjustment. 〔以數位孿生預後模型作模型化對照臂；另見 FDA／EMA 對預後調整的認可。〕
  • Ishwaran, H., & Blackstone, E. H. (2025). Harnessing the power of virtual (digital) twins: graphical causal tools for understanding patient and hospital differences. Computational and Structural Biotechnology Journal. 〔以虛擬（數位）孿生建立圖形化因果工具。〕
  • Cornish, R., Taufiq, M. F., Doucet, A., & Holmes, C. (2023). Causal falsification of digital twins. arXiv:2301.07210. 〔以因果推論評估數位孿生準確度的框架。〕
  • Katsoulakis, E., Wang, Q., Wu, H., et al. (2024). Digital twins for health: a scoping review. npj Digital Medicine, 7, 77. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41746-024-01073-0. 〔健康領域數位孿生的範疇回顧。〕
  • Vallée, A. (2025). Digital twins for personalized medicine require epidemiological data and mathematical modeling: viewpoint. Journal of Medical Internet Research, 27, e72411. 〔觀點：數位孿生需要流行病學資料與數學建模。〕
  • Vallée, A. (2026). A unified framework for causal digital twins. Journal of Translational Medicine, 24, 441. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12967-026-07895-8. 〔因果數位孿生的統一框架。〕
  • Ekström, A. M., & Ottersen, O. P. (2023). Digital twin for pandemic monitoring and prevention: urgent need for agreements for global data sharing. PNAS, 120(40), e2311969120. https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.2311969120. 〔疫情監測用數位孿生與全球資料共享需求。〕
  • Feng, J., Kothari, A., Vossler, P., Bishara, A., Zier, L., Addo, N., Kornblith, A., Tan, Y. S., & Singh, C. (2026). Human-AI co-design for clinical prediction models. npj Digital Medicine. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41746-026-02838-5. 〔HACHI：以 AI 代理人與專家迭代協作、從臨床文字建構完全可解讀的臨床預測模型的框架。〕
  • 群組軌跡模型（GBTM 分頁） · Nagin, D. S. (1999). Analyzing developmental trajectories: a semiparametric, group-based approach. Psychological Methods, 4(2), 139–157. 〔GBTM 開創性論文，提出半參數群組軌跡分析方法。〕
  • Nagin, D. S. (2005). Group-Based Modeling of Development. Harvard University Press. 〔權威專書，系統闡述群組基礎發展模型。〕
  • Nagin, D. S., & Odgers, C. L. (2010). Group-based trajectory modeling in clinical research. Annual Review of Clinical Psychology, 6, 109–138. 〔臨床研究中應用 GBTM 的回顧性指引。〕
  • Nagin, D. S., & Tremblay, R. E. (2005). Developmental trajectory groups: fact or a useful statistical fiction? Criminology, 43(4), 873–904. 〔探討軌跡群組是真實存在或實用統計虛構。〕
  • Jones, B. L., & Nagin, D. S. (2007). Advances in group-based trajectory modeling and an SAS procedure for estimating them. Sociological Methods & Research, 35(4), 542–571. 〔GBTM 方法進展與估計用 SAS 程序介紹。〕
  • R 套件與操作 · Proust-Lima, C., Philipps, V., & Liquet, B. (2017). Estimation of extended mixed models using latent classes and latent processes: the R package lcmm. Journal of Statistical Software, 78(2). https://doi.org/10.18637/jss.v078.i02. 〔R 中做 GBTM 用的 lcmm 套件（hlme／Jointlcmm）。〕
  • Edwards, C. (2023). Group Based Trajectory Modelling: Guide for approach to GBTM in R. Complex Trajectories Project (Erasmus+), CC BY 4.0. 〔實作指引：用 gridsearch 取得穩健起始值，以 BIC＋每組 ≥5%＋多項式顯著選組，並以 pprob 做後驗分類。〕
  • Magrini, A. (2022). Assessment of agricultural sustainability in EU countries: a group-based multivariate trajectory approach. AStA Advances in Statistical Analysis, 106, 673–703. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10182-022-00437-9. 〔gbmt 套件：以 EM 做群組多變量軌跡模型（多指標聯合）；另見 Nagin 等 2018。〕
  • van der Nest, G., Lima Passos, V., Candel, M. J. J. M., & van Breukelen, G. J. P. (2020). An overview of mixture modelling for latent evolutions in longitudinal data. Advances in Life Course Research, 43, 100323. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.alcr.2019.100323. 〔潛在軌跡群組的建模取向、適配統計與軟體總覽。〕
  • 軟體與教學 · Jones, B. L. PROC TRAJ / Stata traj documentation. andrew.cmu.edu/user/bjones. 〔PROC TRAJ / Stata traj 軟體操作文件。〕
  • Columbia Mailman School of Public Health, Population Health Methods. Trajectory Analysis. publichealth.columbia.edu. 〔哥倫比亞大學公衛方法網站之軌跡分析教學。〕
  • Wheeler, A. Using PyTorch for group-based trajectory models (worked notebook). github.com/apwheele. 〔以 PyTorch 實作 GBTM 的範例筆記本。〕
  • 林星帆（dasanlin888）. 群組基礎軌跡模型（GBTM）介紹. 部分一／部分二. 〔林星帆中文 GBTM 入門教學。〕
  • Li, K., Chen, S., Xu, R., Dong, X., Lu, X., Chen, X., Hou, C., & Gao, J. (2025). Group-based trajectory modeling for supportive care needs in Chinese cancer survivors: a systematic review. Asia-Pacific Journal of Oncology Nursing. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apjon.2025.100861. 〔系統性回顧 GBTM 於癌症倖存者支持照護需求之應用。〕
  • Elmer, J., Jones, B. L., & Nagin, D. S. (2018). Using the beta distribution in group-based trajectory models. BMC Medical Research Methodology, 18(1), 152. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12874-018-0620-9. 〔以 beta 分配擴充 GBTM，適用於常態難以配適的連續縱貫資料。〕
  • Dodge, H. H., Shen, C., & Ganguli, M. (2008). Application of the pattern-mixture latent trajectory model in an epidemiological study with non-ignorable missingness. Statistics and its Interface, 1(1), 175–185. https://doi.org/10.4310/SII.2008.v1.n1.a15. 〔結合型態混合與潛在軌跡模型以處理不可忽略的遺漏資料。〕
  • Dai, K., Yang, X., Huang, M., Peng, X., Wang, S., & Rong, Z. (2026). Group-based trajectory modelling and machine learning to identify neurodevelopmental heterogeneity and perinatal predictors in preterm infants. BMC Pediatrics, 26(1), 115. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12887-025-06476-w. 〔結合 GBTM 與機器學習辨識早產兒神經發展軌跡與圍產期預測因子。〕
  • 網路統合分析（NMA 分頁） · Cochrane Comparing Multiple Interventions Methods Group. Network Meta-Analysis Toolkit. methods.cochrane.org/cmi. 〔Cochrane 多介入比較方法組的網絡統合分析工具包。〕
  • Harrer, M., Cuijpers, P., Furukawa, T. A., & Ebert, D. D. (2021). Network Meta-Analysis. In Doing Meta-Analysis with R. doing-meta.guide/netwma. 〔《以 R 做統合分析》中的網絡統合分析章節。〕
  • Salanti, G. (2012). Indirect and mixed-treatment comparison, network, or multiple-treatments meta-analysis. Research Synthesis Methods, 3(2), 80–97. 〔Salanti 綜述間接與混合治療比較方法。〕
  • Bucher, H. C., Guyatt, G. H., Griffith, L. E., & Walter, S. D. (1997). The results of direct and indirect treatment comparisons. Journal of Clinical Epidemiology, 50(6), 683–691. 〔Bucher 法：經典的調整間接比較方法。〕
  • Rücker, G., & Schwarzer, G. (2015). Ranking treatments in frequentist NMA (P-score). BMC Medical Research Methodology, 15, 58 (netmeta). 〔頻率學派 NMA 排序方法 P-score 與 netmeta。〕
  • Nikolakopoulou, A., Higgins, J. P. T., Papakonstantinou, T., et al. (2020). CINeMA: confidence in network meta-analysis. PLoS Medicine, 17(4), e1003082. 〔CINeMA：評估網絡統合分析證據可信度的框架。〕
  • Rouse, B., Chaimani, A., & Li, T. (2017). Network meta-analysis: an introduction for clinicians. Internal and Emergency Medicine, 12(1), 103–111. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11739-016-1583-7. 〔為臨床醫師撰寫的網路統合分析入門。〕
  • Florez, I. D., De La Cruz-Mena, J. E., & Veroniki, A.-A. (2024). Network meta-analysis: a powerful tool for clinicians, decision-makers, and methodologists. Journal of Clinical Epidemiology, 176, 111538. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jclinepi.2024.111538. 〔NMA 核心概念綜述，面向臨床與決策者。〕
  • Tsokani, S., Seitidis, G., & Mavridis, D. (2023). Component network meta-analysis in a nutshell. BMJ Evidence-Based Medicine, 28(3), 183–186. https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjebm-2021-111906. 〔成分網路統合分析的簡明介紹。〕
  • Reason, T., Benbow, E., Langham, J., Gimblett, A., Klijn, S. L., & Malcolm, B. (2024). Artificial intelligence to automate network meta-analyses: four case studies. PharmacoEconomics - Open, 8(2), 205–220. https://doi.org/10.1007/s41669-024-00476-9. 〔以大型語言模型自動化 NMA：四個案例研究評估。〕
  • Reason, T., Wu, Y., Jones, C., Benbow, E., Johannesen, K., & Malcolm, B. (2025). The "artificial intelligence statistician": utilizing generative AI to select an appropriate model and execute network meta-analyses. Value in Health. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.05.012. 〔生成式 AI 選擇模型並執行 NMA。〕
  • Li, L., Mathrani, A., & Susnjak, T. (2026). Transforming evidence synthesis: a systematic review of the evolution of automated meta-analysis in the age of AI. Research Synthesis Methods, 17, 403–450. https://doi.org/10.1017/rsm.2025.10065. 〔AI 時代自動化統合分析演進的系統性回顧。〕
  • A clinician's guide to network meta-analysis. (2022). Eye, 36(8), 1523–1526. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41433-022-01943-5. 〔社論：臨床醫師的網路統合分析指引。〕
  • AI／自動化篩選 · Ouzzani, M., Hammady, H., Fedorowicz, Z., & Elmagarmid, A. (2016). Rayyan — a web and mobile app for systematic reviews. Systematic Reviews, 5, 210. rayyan.com. 〔Rayyan：協助系統性回顧文獻篩選的網頁與行動應用工具。〕
  • Marshall, I. J., & Wallace, B. C. (2019). Toward systematic review automation: a practical guide to using machine learning tools in research synthesis. Systematic Reviews, 8, 163. 〔回顧機器學習自動化系統性回顧的工具與前景。〕
  • Bannach-Brown, A., Przybyła, P., Thomas, J., et al. (2019). Machine learning algorithms for systematic review: reducing workload and human screening error. Systematic Reviews, 8, 23. 〔評估機器學習於系統性回顧篩選，以減少工作量與錯誤。〕
  • Hanegraaf, P., Wondimu, A., Mosselman, J. J., et al. (2024). Inter-reviewer reliability of human literature reviewing and implications for machine-assisted systematic reviews. BMJ Open, 14, e076912. 〔探討機器輔助系統性回顧的審查者間信度。〕
  • Guo, E., Gupta, M., Deng, J., et al. (2024). Automated paper screening for clinical reviews using large language models. JMIR, 26, e48996. 〔運用大型語言模型自動篩選臨床回顧文獻的研究。〕
  • Mathur, M. B., & VanderWeele, T. J. (2020). Sensitivity analysis for publication bias in meta-analyses. Journal of the Royal Statistical Society: Series C (Applied Statistics), 69(5), 1091–1119. https://doi.org/10.1111/rssc.12440. 〔提出針對統合分析中發表偏誤的敏感度分析方法。〕
  • Braginsky, M., Mathur, M. B., & VanderWeele, T. J. PublicationBias: sensitivity analysis for publication bias in meta-analyses (R package). cran.r-project.org/package=PublicationBias. 〔需要多強的發表偏誤才會移動合併估計／信賴區間，significance funnel 與最壞情況估計〕
  • Homayra, F., Enns, B., Min, J. E., Kurz, M., Bach, P., Bruneau, J., et al. (2024). Comparative Analysis of Instrumental Variables on the Assignment of Buprenorphine/Naloxone or Methadone for the Treatment of Opioid Use Disorder. Epidemiology, 35(2), 218–231. 〔A1–A4b 假設檢驗框架〕
  • Singh, A., Hosanagar, K., & Gandhi, A. (2020). Machine Learning Instrument Variables for Causal Inference. In Proceedings of the 21st ACM Conference on Economics and Computation (EC '20), 835–836. 〔合成工具〕
  • Bakhitov, E. (2025). On machine learning instrumental variable estimators. Economics Letters. 〔ML 工具變數估計量的性質〕
  • Bruns-Smith, D. (2025). Two-Stage Machine Learning for Nonparametric Instrumental Variable Regression. Stanford University. 〔可彎的第一階段〕
  • Peng, J. (2024). Machine Learning for Instrumental Variable Regression: From Bias to Resilience. University of Connecticut. SSRN 5008641. 〔禁止迴歸偏誤〕
  • Wu, A., Kuang, K., Xiong, R., & Wu, F. (2022). Instrumental Variables in Causal Inference and Machine Learning: A Survey. arXiv:2212.05778. 〔IV 與機器學習綜述〕
  • Kaufman, E. J., Keele, L. J., Wirtalla, C. J., Rosen, C. B., Roberts, S. E., Mavroudis, C. L., et al. (2023). Operative and Nonoperative Outcomes of Emergency General Surgery Conditions: An Observational Study Using a Novel Instrumental Variable. Annals of Surgery. 〔以偏好為基礎的工具變數與近遠配對〕
  • Cattaneo, M. D., Keele, L., & Titiunik, R. (2023). Covariate Adjustment in Regression Discontinuity Designs. In Handbook of Matching and Weighting Adjustments for Causal Inference (Ch. 8). CRC Press. https://doi.org/10.1201/9781003102670-8. 〔RDD 的共變項調整、效率提升，以及共變項能不能補救 RDD〕
  • Wang, Q. (2025). Double/Debiased Machine Learning for Inference in Regression Discontinuity Designs under Local Randomization (thesis, advised by J. Bradic). 〔RDD 的雙重機器學習；對頻寬／視窗選擇的穩健性：RDD 分頁⑤ 藥方一〕
  • Schuessler, M., Sverdrup, E., Tibshirani, J., & Wager, S. (2026). Nonparametric Regression Discontinuity Designs with Survival Outcomes. Stanford University. arXiv:2604.03502. 〔以彈性機器學習做雙重穩健的設限校正：RDD 分頁⑤ 藥方二〕
  • Adeleke, M. O., Baio, G., & O'Keeffe, A. G. (2022). Regression discontinuity designs for time-to-event outcomes: An approach using accelerated failure time models. Journal of the Royal Statistical Society: Series A, 185(3), 1216. https://doi.org/10.1111/rssa.12812. 〔RDD 存活的純參數 AFT 取徑：RDD 分頁⑤ 藥方二〕
  • Crowther, M. J., Royston, P., & Clements, M. (2023). A flexible parametric accelerated failure time model and the extension to time-dependent acceleration factors. Biostatistics, 24(3), 811–831. https://doi.org/10.1093/biostatistics/kxac009. 〔以限制性立方樣條的彈性 AFT，可塌縮、適合因果推論：RDD 分頁⑤ 藥方二〕
  • 彈性 ML／雙重穩健 RDD · Noack, C., Olma, T., & Rothe, C. (2024). Flexible Covariate Adjustments in Regression Discontinuity Designs. arXiv:2107.07942. 〔RDFlex：以 DML 做彈性共變項調整換精度；實作於 DoubleML：RDD 分頁⑤ 前沿閱讀①〕
  • Kato, M. (2024). Doubly Robust Regression Discontinuity Designs. University of Tokyo. arXiv:2411.07978. 〔雙穩健斷點迴歸設計方法論論文。〕
  • DoubleML team. RDFlex example. https://docs.doubleml.org/stable/examples/py_double_ml_rdflex.html. 〔DoubleML 的 RDFlex 斷點迴歸線上範例文件。〕
  • Wang, Q. (2025). Double/Debiased Machine Learning for Inference in Regression Discontinuity Designs under Local Randomization (advised by J. Bradic), UC San Diego. 〔局部隨機化下斷點迴歸的去偏機器學習推論。〕

  • O'Keeffe, A. G., Geneletti, S., Baio, G., Sharples, L. D., Nazareth, I., & Petersen, I. (2014). BMJ, 349, g5293. https://doi.org/10.1136/bmj.g5293. 〔BMJ 教學文，以基層醫療 statin 處方為例說明 RDD。〕
  • O'Keeffe, A. G., & Petersen, I. (2020). Regression discontinuity designs in epidemiology: a practical guide. Clinical Epidemiology. https://doi.org/10.2147/CLEP.S552437. 〔臨床流行病學中應用 RDD 的實務指南。〕
  • Calonico, S., Jawadekar, N., Kezios, K., & Zeki Al Hazzouri, A. (2024). Regression discontinuity design studies: a guide for health researchers. BMJ, 384, e072254. https://doi.org/10.1136/bmj-2023-072254. 〔BMJ 給健康研究者的 RDD 研究指南。〕

  • Cho, Y., Hu, C., & Ghosh, D. (2022). Analysis of regression discontinuity designs using censored data. Statistics in Medicine. 〔在設限（存活）資料下估計 RDD 因果效應。〕
  • Rothbard, S., Etheridge, J. C., & Murray, E. J. (2024). A Tutorial on Applying the Difference-in-Differences Method to Health Data. Current Epidemiology Reports, 11, 85–95. https://doi.org/10.1007/s40471-023-00327-x. 〔DiD 基礎、假設與合成資料：DiD 分頁 ①–④〕
  • Chang, N.-C. (2020). Double/debiased machine learning for difference-in-differences models. The Econometrics Journal, 23(2), 177–191. https://doi.org/10.1093/ectj/utaa001. 〔雙重穩健／DML DiD：DiD 分頁⑤ 進階①〕
  • Callaway, B., & Sant'Anna, P. H. C. (2021). Difference-in-Differences with multiple time periods. Journal of Econometrics, 225(2), 200–230. 〔交錯採用、群組-時間 ATT：DiD 分頁⑤ 進階②〕
  • Goodman-Bacon, A. (2021). Difference-in-Differences with variation in treatment timing. Journal of Econometrics, 225(2), 254–277. 〔交錯時點下雙向固定效果為何會偏：DiD 分頁⑤ 進階②〕
  • Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. J., Park, C., & Richardson, D. B. (2024). Universal Difference-in-Differences for Causal Inference in Epidemiology. Epidemiology, 35(1), 16–22. https://doi.org/10.1097/EDE.0000000000001676. 〔二元/計數結果的勝算比尺度 DiD：DiD 分頁⑤ 進階③〕
  • Haddad, M. F. C., Huber, M., Medina-Reyes, J. E., & Zhang, L. Z. (2025). Difference-in-Differences with Time-varying Continuous Treatments Using Double/Debiased Machine Learning. arXiv:2410.21105. 〔連續、時變處置的 DML DiD：DiD 分頁⑤〕
  • Abadie, A., Diamond, A., & Hainmueller, J. (2010). Synthetic Control Methods for Comparative Case Studies. Journal of the American Statistical Association, 105(490), 493–505. 〔合成控制／合成 DiD：DiD 分頁⑤ 進階④〕
  • Richardson, D. B., Ye, T., & Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. J. (2023). Generalized Difference-in-Differences. Epidemiology, 34(2), 167–174. https://doi.org/10.1097/EDE.0000000000001568. 〔以結合準實驗設計放寬平行趨勢假設：DiD 分頁⑤〕

The population-level effect of adjuvant therapies on breast-cancer recurrence: application of the trend-in-trend design. Epidemiology, 35(5), 660–666. https://doi.org/10.1097/EDE.0000000000001753. 〔應用範例〕
  • Bernal, J. L., Cummins, S., & Gasparrini, A. (2017). Interrupted time series regression for the evaluation of public health interventions: a tutorial. International Journal of Epidemiology, 46(1), 348–355. https://doi.org/10.1093/ije/dyw098. 〔分段迴歸、HAC 標準誤：ITS 分頁 ①–④〕
  • Schaffer, A. L., Curtis, H. J., & Speed, V. (2026). Interrupted Time Series Analysis for Policy Evaluation. JAMA Internal Medicine, 186(6), 765. https://doi.org/10.1001/jamainternmed.2026.0827. 〔白話 ITS 入門（JAMA 統計與方法指引）；水準跳變 vs 斜率改變、反事實外推：ITS 分頁①②〕
  • Schaffer, A. L., Dobbins, T. A., & Pearson, S-A. (2021). Interrupted time series analysis using ARIMA models. BMC Medical Research Methodology, 21, 58. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12874-021-01235-8. 〔ARIMA／自相關：ITS 分頁⑤ ①〕
  • Linden, A. (2026). Improving causal inference in interrupted time series analysis: the triple difference design. arXiv:2603.17281. 〔控制組 ITS／三重差分：ITS 分頁⑤ ②〕
  • Dey, A. K., Ma, Y., Carrasco-Escobar, G., Han, C., Rerolle, F., & Benmarhnia, T. (2025). Two-stage interrupted time series analysis with machine learning. American Journal of Epidemiology, 194(10), 2936–2944. https://doi.org/10.1093/aje/kwaf147. 〔ML 兩階段反事實：ITS 分頁⑤ ③〕

  • Schaffer, A. L., Curtis, H. J., & Speed, V. (2026). Interrupted Time Series Analysis for Policy Evaluation. JAMA Internal Medicine, 186(6), 764. 〔ITS 政策評估應用範例（doxyPEP）〕

  • van Aalst, R., Thommes, E., Postma, M., Chit, A., & Dahabreh, I. J. (2021). On the Causal Interpretation of Rate-Change Methods: The Prior Event Rate Ratio and Rate Difference.   • Rodgers, L. R., Dennis, J. M., Shields, B. M., Mounce, L., Fisher, I., Hattersley, A. T., & Henley, W. E. (2020).   • Webster-Clark, M., Ross, R. K., & Lund, J. L. (2021). Initiator types and the causal question of the prevalent new-user design: a simulation study. American Journal of Epidemiology, 190(7), 1341–1348. https://doi.org/10.1093/aje/kwaa283. 〔起始者類型如何界定 PNU 設計的因果問題。〕
  • Filion, K. B., & Yu, Y.-H. (2021). Invited commentary: the prevalent new-user design in pharmacoepidemiology—challenges and opportunities. American Journal of Epidemiology, 190(7), 1349–1352. https://doi.org/10.1093/aje/kwaa284. 〔評論：PNU 設計的挑戰與機會。〕
  • Koinuma, T., & Akazawa, M. (2024). Evaluating the potential of prevalent new user design as an alternative when new user design is impractical. Pragmatic and Observational Research, 15, 89–101. https://doi.org/10.2147/POR.S517514. 〔當新使用者設計不可行時，以 PNU 設計作為替代方案。〕
  • 量化偏誤分析（QBA 分頁） · VanderWeele, T. J., & Ding, P. (2017). Sensitivity analysis in observational research: introducing the E-value. Annals of Internal Medicine, 167(4), 268–274. 〔開創性論文，提出評估未測量混淆因子的 E 值敏感度分析方法。〕
  • Ding, P., & VanderWeele, T. J. (2016). Sensitivity analysis without assumptions. Epidemiology, 27(3), 368–377. 〔Ding–VanderWeele 偏誤因子〕
  • Haneuse, S., VanderWeele, T. J., & Arterburn, D. (2019). Using the E-value to assess the potential effect of unmeasured confounding in observational studies. JAMA, 321(6), 602–603. 〔JAMA 指南方法文章，示範如何用 E 值評估潛在未測量混淆。〕
  • Mathur, M. B., Ding, P., Riddell, C. A., & VanderWeele, T. J. (2018). Web site and R package for computing E-values. Epidemiology, 29(5), e45–e47 (the EValue package). 〔介紹計算 E 值的線上工具與 R 套件。〕
  • Mathur, M. B., Smith, L. H., Ding, P., & VanderWeele, T. J. EValue: sensitivity analyses for unmeasured confounding and other biases in observational studies and meta-analyses (R package, v4.1). cran.r-project.org/package=EValue. 〔E-value、選樣偏誤、測量誤差、多重偏誤與統合分析敏感度，③ 程式所用的套件〕
  • VanderWeele, T. J., & Mathur, M. B. (2020). Commentary: developing best-practice guidelines for the reporting of E-values. International Journal of Epidemiology, 49(5), 1495–1497. 〔報告 E 值的最佳實務指引與評論。〕
  • E-value calculator (official online tool). evalue-calculator.com/evalue. 〔官方 E 值線上計算器網站。〕
  • Schneeweiss, S. (2006). Sensitivity analysis and external adjustment for unmeasured confounders in epidemiologic database studies of therapeutics (the array approach). Pharmacoepidemiology and Drug Safety, 15(5), 291–303. 〔提出陣列法外部校正未測量混淆的敏感度分析方法。〕
  • Schneeweiss, S. Sensitivity Analysis for Confounding — Excel workbook (array / rule-out / external-adjustment sheets); the basis of the ② array-approach calculator's notation (ARR, RRCD, PC1, PC0 → RRadj). 〔Schneeweiss 混淆敏感度分析的 Excel 工作簿（陣列／排除法）。〕
  • Lash, T. L., Fox, M. P., & Fink, A. K. (2009). Applying Quantitative Bias Analysis to Epidemiologic Data. Springer (2nd ed.: Fox, MacLehose & Lash, 2021). 〔量化偏差分析的權威專書。〕
  • Lash, T. L., Fox, M. P., MacLehose, R. F., Maldonado, G., McCandless, L. C., & Greenland, S. (2014). Good practices for quantitative bias analysis. International Journal of Epidemiology, 43(6), 1969–1985. 〔量化偏差分析的良好實務建議。〕
  • Greenland, S. (1996). Basic methods for sensitivity analysis of biases. International Journal of Epidemiology, 25(6), 1107–1116. 〔偏差敏感度分析的基礎方法經典文獻。〕
  • D'Agostino McGowan, L. (2022). Sensitivity analyses for unmeasured confounders. Current Epidemiology Reports, 9, 361–375. https://doi.org/10.1007/s40471-022-00308-6. 〔未測量混淆敏感度分析方法的近期綜述。〕
  • Haine, D. episensr: basic sensitivity analysis of epidemiological results (R package vignette). cran.r-project.org/.../episensr. 〔episensr R 套件的流行病學敏感度分析說明文件。〕
  • Brown, J. P., Hunnicutt, J. N., Ali, M. S., et al. (2024). Quantifying possible bias in clinical and epidemiological studies with quantitative bias analysis: common approaches and limitations. BMJ, 385, e076365. https://doi.org/10.1136/bmj-2023-076365. 〔BMJ 文章評析量化偏差分析的常見方法與限制。〕
  • Shi, X., Liu, Z., Zhang, M., …, Lash, T. L., & Wallach, J. D. (2024). Quantitative bias analysis methods for summary-level epidemiologic data in the peer-reviewed literature: a systematic review. Journal of Clinical Epidemiology. 〔摘要層級流行病學資料量化偏差分析方法的系統性回顧。〕
  • Jiang, T., Gradus, J. L., Lash, T. L., & Fox, M. P. (2021). Addressing measurement error in random forests using quantitative bias analysis. American Journal of Epidemiology, 190(9), 1830–1840. https://doi.org/10.1093/aje/kwab010. 〔以量化偏差分析處理隨機森林測量誤差。〕
  • Use of sensitivity analyses to assess uncontrolled confounding from unmeasured factors (systematic review). (2025). American Journal of Epidemiology, 194, 524–535. https://doi.org/10.1093/aje/kwae234. 〔系統性回顧敏感度分析評估未控制混淆的使用情況。〕
  • Quantitative bias analysis in regulatory settings. (2016). American Journal of Public Health, 106(7), 1227–1230. https://doi.org/10.2105/AJPH.2016.303199. 〔討論監管情境中量化偏差分析的應用。〕
  • Chung, W. T., & Chung, K. C. (2023). The use of the E-value for sensitivity analysis. Journal of Clinical Epidemiology. 〔評論 E 值用於敏感度分析的應用與爭議。〕
  • Fang, Y., Mishra-Kalyani, P., Zhang, X., Gruber, S., Yang, S., Ding, P., et al. (2023). Sensitivity analysis for unmeasured confounding in medical product development and evaluation using real-world evidence (ASA–FDA working group). arXiv:2307.07442. 〔ASA–FDA 工作小組就真實世界證據未測量混淆敏感度分析的報告。〕
  • 應用實例（本團隊） · Huang, H.-K., Liu, P. P.-S., Lin, S.-M., Hsu, J.-Y., Yeh, J.-I., Lai, E. C.-C., et al. (2022). Diabetes-related complications and mortality in patients with atrial fibrillation receiving different oral anticoagulants: a nationwide analysis. Annals of Internal Medicine, 175(4), 490–498. https://doi.org/10.7326/M21-3498. 〔點估計的 E-value 約 1.4–1.7，是 ① 分頁 ~1.5 基準的來源〕
  • Chou, T.-S., Tsai, D. H.-T., Shao, S.-C., & Lai, E. C.-C. (2026). SGLT-2 inhibitor use and liver-related and mortality outcomes in patients with type 2 diabetes and compensated cirrhosis. BMC Medicine, 24, 78. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12916-026-04629-x. 〔應用實例：目標試驗模擬（第 2 型糖尿病合併代償性肝硬化，SGLT-2 對 DPP-4 抑制劑），以 E-value 評估未測混淆的潛在影響；該大小的 E-value 是否令人安心，需對照如 ~1.5 的基準、由臨床判斷〕
  • 概念 · Lipsitch, M., Tchetgen Tchetgen, E., & Cohen, T. (2010). Negative controls: a tool for detecting confounding and bias in observational studies. Epidemiology, 21(3), 383–388. 〔陰性對照經典，NC 分頁 ①②〕
  • 近端校正 · Miao, W., Geng, Z., & Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. J. (2018). Identifying causal effects with proxy variables of an unmeasured confounder. Biometrika, 105(4), 987–993. 〔以代理變數辨識未測量混淆下因果效應的關鍵理論論文。〕
  • Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. J., Ying, A., Cui, Y., Shi, X., & Miao, W. (2024). An introduction to proximal causal inference. Statistical Science. 〔近端因果推論的入門綜述。〕
  • regression-based proximal causal inference (Epidemiology, 2025). 〔以迴歸為基礎的近端因果推論方法。〕
  • AI／校準 · Schuemie, M. J., Ryan, P. B., DuMouchel, W., Suchard, M. A., & Madigan, D. (2014). Interpreting observational studies: why empirical calibration is needed to correct p-values. Statistics in Medicine, 33(2), 209–218. 〔論證需以實證校準修正p值的論文。〕
  • Schuemie, M. J., Hripcsak, G., Ryan, P. B., Madigan, D., & Suchard, M. A. (2018). Empirical confidence interval calibration for population-level effect estimation studies in observational healthcare data. PNAS, 115(11), 2571–2577. 〔族群層級效應估計的實證信賴區間校準。〕
  • 疫苗應用 · Li, K. Q., Shi, X., Miao, W., & Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. (2023). Double negative control inference in test-negative design studies of vaccine effectiveness. JASA. 〔檢測陰性設計疫苗研究中的雙重負對照推論。〕
  • Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. (2014). The control outcome calibration approach. AJE, 179(5), 633–640. 〔提出控制結果校準法以處理未測量混淆。〕
  • Ringlein, G. V., Nguyen, T. Q., Zandi, P. P., Stuart, E. A., & Parikh, H. (2026). Demystifying proximal causal inference. arXiv:2512.24413. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2512.24413. 〔以易懂方式闡明近端因果推論的入門教學。〕
  • Zhang, D., Zhang, B., Wang, H., Lu, Y., Wolock, C. J., Hu, W., Wang, L., Hripcsak, G., & Chen, Y. (2025). Negative control-calibrated difference-in-difference analyses: addressing unmeasured confounding in real-world data. npj Digital Medicine, 8, 1821. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41746-025-01821-w. 〔以負對照校準的差異中之差異法，處理真實世界資料的未測量混淆。〕
  • Schuemie, M. J., Bu, F., Nishimura, A., & Suchard, M. A. (2023). Adjusting for both sequential testing and systematic error in safety surveillance using observational data: empirical calibration and MaxSPRT. Statistics in Medicine, 42(5), 619–631. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.9631. 〔結合實證校準與 MaxSPRT 的序列安全監測方法。〕
  • Li, K., Emerman, I., Cook, A. J., Fireman, B. H., Sundaram, M., Tseng, H.-F. X., et al. (2024). Using double negative controls to adjust for healthy user bias in a recombinant zoster vaccine safety study. 〔以雙重負對照校正帶狀疱疹疫苗安全研究中的健康使用者偏誤。〕
  • Yang, Q., & Jia, J. (2025). Double negative control inference with some invalid negative control exposures for continuous outcome. Statistics in Medicine. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.70091. 〔允許部分無效負對照暴露的連續結果雙重負對照推論。〕
  • Miao, W., Shi, X., Li, Y., & Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. J. (2024). A confounding bridge approach for double negative control inference on causal effects. Statistical Theory and Related Fields. https://doi.org/10.1080/24754269.2024.2390748. 〔雙重負對照辨識所依據的混淆橋接框架。〕
  • Yang, Q., Yang, Z., Cai, X., Zhao, H., Jia, J., & Sun, F. (2023). Advances in methodologies of negative controls: a scoping review. Journal of Clinical Epidemiology, 162, 1–10. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jclinepi.2023.08.020. 〔負對照方法學進展的範圍綜述。〕
  • Egami, N., & Tchetgen Tchetgen, E. J. (2021). Identification and estimation of causal peer effects using double negative controls for unmeasured network confounding. arXiv:2109.01933. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2109.01933. 〔以雙重負對照辨識網絡混淆下的因果同儕效應。〕
  • Kummerfeld, E., Lim, J., & Shi, X. (2024). Data-driven automated negative control estimation (DANCE): search for, validation of, and causal inference with negative controls. Journal of Machine Learning Research, 25, 1–35. 〔自動搜尋與驗證負對照以進行因果推論的方法。〕
  • 方法／軟體 · Tingley, D., Yamamoto, T., Hirose, K., Keele, L., & Imai, K. (2014). mediation: R Package for Causal Mediation Analysis. Journal of Statistical Software, 59(5), 1–38. https://doi.org/10.18637/jss.v059.i05. 〔mediate() 工作流程：ACME／ADE、模擬、medsens：MED 分頁 ③⑤⑦〕
  • Imai, K., Keele, L., & Yamamoto, T. (2010). Identification, Inference and Sensitivity Analysis for Causal Mediation Effects. Statistical Science, 25(1), 51–71. 〔序列可忽略性與模擬法：MED 分頁 ④⑤〕
  • Valeri, L., & VanderWeele, T. J. (2013). Mediation analysis allowing for exposure-mediator interactions and causal interpretation: theoretical assumptions and implementation with SAS and SPSS macros. Psychological Methods, 18(2), 137–150. 〔暴露–中介交互；NDE／NIE／CDE：MED 分頁 ①③⑦〕
  • VanderWeele, T. J. (2015). Explanation in Causal Inference: Methods for Mediation and Interaction. Oxford University Press. 〔VanderWeele 中介與交互作用方法權威專著。〕
  • Baron, R. M., & Kenny, D. A. (1986). The moderator-mediator variable distinction in social psychological research. JPSP, 51(6), 1173–1182. 〔Baron 與 Kenny 經典：調節與中介變項區分。〕
  • 應用指引 · Schuler, M. S., Coffman, D. L., Stuart, E. A., Nguyen, T. Q., Vegetabile, B., & McCaffrey, D. F. (2025). Practical challenges in mediation analysis: a guide for applied researchers. Health Services and Outcomes Research Methodology, 25, 57–84. 〔中介分析實務挑戰的操作指引。〕
  • StataCorp. causal mediation analysis (the mediate command). 〔Stata 因果中介分析（mediate 指令）說明。〕
  • Iacobucci, D. (2011). Mediation Analysis. Sage Publications. https://doi.org/10.4135/9781412984966. 〔中介分析與結構方程取向的精簡專著。〕
  • Nath, T., Caffo, B., Wager, T., & Lindquist, M. A. (2023). A machine learning based approach towards high-dimensional mediation analysis. NeuroImage, 268, 119843. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.119843. 〔以機器學習處理高維中介分析，並應用於 fMRI。〕
  • Chen, T., Vansteelandt, S., Burgner, D., Mansell, T., & Moreno-Betancur, M. (2025). Causal machine learning for high-dimensional mediation analysis using interventional effects mapped to a target trial. arXiv:2504.15834. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2504.15834. 〔以目標試驗框架下的介入效應，用因果機器學習做高維中介分析。〕
  • Zenati, H., Abécassis, J., Josse, J., & Thirion, B. (2025). Double debiased machine learning for mediation analysis with continuous treatments. Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (AISTATS). 〔針對連續處理變項的雙重去偏機器學習中介分析。〕
  • Wei, K., Liu, Y., Huang, C., Lin, R., Yu, Y., & Qin, G. (2025). Debiased machine learning for ultra-high dimensional mediation analysis. Bioinformatics. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btaf282. 〔超高維中介分析的去偏機器學習方法。〕
  • 奠基 · Rosenbaum, P. R., & Rubin, D. B. (1983). The central role of the propensity score in observational studies for causal effects. Biometrika, 70(1), 41–55. https://doi.org/10.1093/biomet/70.1.41. 〔傾向分數與平衡性質：PS 分頁 ①③⑥〕
  • Austin, P. C. (2011). An Introduction to Propensity Score Methods for Reducing the Effects of Confounding in Observational Studies. Multivariate Behavioral Research, 46(3), 399–424. https://doi.org/10.1080/00273171.2011.568786. 〔配對、IPTW、分層與 SMD 平衡診斷：PS 分頁 ③④〕
  • Brookhart, M. A., Schneeweiss, S., Rothman, K. J., Glynn, R. J., Avorn, J., & Stürmer, T. (2006). Variable Selection for Propensity Score Models. American Journal of Epidemiology, 163(12), 1149–1156. https://doi.org/10.1093/aje/kwj149. 〔該放哪些共變項：混淆與結果風險因子、別放工具（Z-bias）， PS 分頁 ④〕
  • Li, F., Morgan, K. L., & Zaslavsky, A. M. (2018). Balancing Covariates via Propensity Score Weighting. Journal of the American Statistical Association, 113(521), 390–400. https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2016.1260466. 〔重疊權重（ATO）：精確平衡、權重有界：PS 分頁 ①②③〕
  • 高維傾向分數（hdPS） · Schneeweiss, S., Rassen, J. A., Glynn, R. J., Avorn, J., Mogun, H., & Brookhart, M. A. (2009). High-dimensional propensity score adjustment in studies of treatment effects using health care claims data. Epidemiology, 20(4), 512–522. https://doi.org/10.1097/EDE.0b013e3181a663cc. 〔提出高維傾向分數方法，利用申報資料自動選取共變數調整干擾。〕
  • Tazare, J., Smeeth, L., Evans, S. J. W., Douglas, I. J., & Williamson, E. J. (2023). hdps: A suite of commands for applying high-dimensional propensity-score approaches. Stata Journal, 23(3), 683–708. 〔介紹在 Stata 實作高維傾向分數的 hdps 指令套件。〕
  • Karim, M. E. High-dimensional Propensity Score (hdPS) Workshop. ehsanx.github.io/hdPSw. 〔高維傾向分數實作教學的線上工作坊教材。〕
  • 機器學習／高維 PS · Schneeweiss, S., Rassen, J. A., Glynn, R. J., Avorn, J., Mogun, H., & Brookhart, M. A. (2009). High-dimensional Propensity Score Adjustment in Studies of Treatment Effects Using Health Care Claims Data. Epidemiology, 20(4), 512–522. 〔原始高維傾向分數文獻，列於機器學習／高維傾向分數主題下。〕
  • Desai, R. J., & Franklin, J. M. (2019). Alternative approaches for confounding adjustment in observational studies using weighting based on the propensity score: a primer for practitioners. BMJ, 367, l5657. https://doi.org/10.1136/bmj.l5657. 〔傾向分數加權法調整干擾的入門綜述。〕
  • Leite, W., Zhang, H., Collier, Z., Chawla, K., Kong, L., Lee, Y., Quan, J., & Soyoye, O. (2025). Machine Learning for Propensity Score Estimation: A Systematic Review and Reporting Guidelines. Psychological Methods (advance online). https://doi.org/10.1037/met0000789. 〔ML-PS 系統性回顧與報告指引：PS 分頁 ⑤ 注意事項 ④〕
  • Wang, K., Rosman, L., & Lu, H. (2025). Evaluation of Machine Learning-Based Propensity Score Estimation: A Benchmarking Observational Analysis Against a Randomized Trial. medRxiv 2025.06.16.25329708. 〔ML-PS 以隨機試驗為標準的基準研究：靠平衡而非預測還原試驗結果：PS 分頁 ⑤ 注意事項 ④〕
  • Goller, D., Lechner, M., Moczall, A., & Wolff, J. (2020). Does the estimation of the propensity score by machine learning improve matching estimation? The case of Germany's programmes for long term unemployed. Labour Economics, 65, 101855. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.labeco.2020.101855. 〔ML-PS 相對精心建好的邏輯斯模型僅小幅改善配對：PS 分頁 ⑤ 注意事項 ③〕
  • Ju, C. (under M. J. van der Laan). Propensity Score Estimation with Machine Learning Methods on Electronic Health Databases with Healthcare Claims Data (UC Berkeley, Division of Biostatistics). 〔以機器學習估計傾向分數的柏克萊博士論文。〕
  • Fan, J., Beemer, J., Yan, X., & Levine, R. A. On Machine Learning Methods for Propensity Score Matching and Weighting in Educational Data Mining Applications (ch. 18). 〔教育資料探勘中傾向分數配對與加權的機器學習方法章節。〕
  • 奠基 · van der Laan, M. J., & Rubin, D. (2006). Targeted Maximum Likelihood Learning. The International Journal of Biostatistics, 2(1), Article 11. https://doi.org/10.2202/1557-4679.1043. 〔首篇提出標靶最大概似估計（TMLE）的奠基論文。〕
  • van der Laan, M. J., & Rose, S. (2011). Targeted Learning: Causal Inference for Observational and Experimental Data. Springer. 〔標靶學習的權威專書，涵蓋觀察與實驗資料的因果推論。〕
  • Luque-Fernandez, M. A., Schomaker, M., Rachet, B., & Schnitzer, M. E. (2018). Targeted maximum likelihood estimation for a binary treatment: A tutorial. Statistics in Medicine, 37(16), 2530–2546. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.7628. 〔二元處理之 TMLE 應用實作教學文章。〕
  • Gruber, S., & van der Laan, M. J. Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation: A Gentle Introduction (UC Berkeley Working Paper). 〔柏克萊工作論文，平易近人地介紹 TMLE。〕
  • Super Learner 與交叉擬合 · van der Laan, M. J., Polley, E. C., & Hubbard, A. E. (2007). Super Learner. Statistical Applications in Genetics and Molecular Biology, 6(1), Article 25. 〔提出 Super Learner 集成預測法，常作為 TMLE 的估計引擎。〕
  • Schuler, M. S., & Rose, S. (2017). Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Causal Inference in Observational Studies. American Journal of Epidemiology, 185(1), 65–73. 〔面向流行病學者的觀察性研究 TMLE 應用導論。〕
  • Li, Y., McCoy, D., Gunter, N., Lee, K., Schuler, A., & van der Laan, M. (2025). Targeted deep architectures: a TMLE-based framework for robust causal inference in neural networks. arXiv:2507.12435. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2507.12435. 〔將 TMLE 嵌入深度神經網路以獲取有效因果推論。〕
  • Jonsson Funk, M., Westreich, D., Wiesen, C., Stürmer, T., Brookhart, M. A., & Davidian, M. (2011). Doubly robust estimation of causal effects. American Journal of Epidemiology, 173(7), 761–767. https://doi.org/10.1093/aje/kwq439. 〔雙重穩健估計入門，闡述 TMLE 背後的核心原理。〕
  • Talbot, D., Diop, A., Mésidor, M., Chiu, Y., Sirois, C., Spieker, A. J., et al. (2025). Guidelines and best practices for the use of targeted maximum likelihood and machine learning when estimating causal effects of exposures on time-to-event outcomes. Statistics in Medicine, 44. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.10300. 〔將 TMLE 與機器學習應用於事件時間結果的實務指引。〕
  • 奠基 · Robins, J. M., Hernán, M. Á., & Brumback, B. (2000). Marginal Structural Models and Causal Inference in Epidemiology. Epidemiology, 11(5), 550–560. 〔時變治療的邊際結構模型與 IPTW：GM 分頁 ①③〕

  • Shinozaki, T., & Suzuki, E. (2020). Understanding Marginal Structural Models for Time-Varying Exposures: Pitfalls and Tips. Journal of Epidemiology, 30(9), 377–389. https://doi.org/10.2188/jea.JE20200226. 〔MSM ≠ IP 加權：MSM 是因果模型、IPW 只是其中一種估法：層級釐清，GM ①〕
  • Daniel, R. M., Cousens, S. N., De Stavola, B. L., Kenward, M. G., & Sterne, J. A. C. (2013). Methods for dealing with time-dependent confounding. Statistics in Medicine, 32(9), 1584–1618. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.5686. 〔處理時間相依干擾各種方法的比較綜述。〕

  • Rowley, E. A. K., et al. (2025). Methods to Adjust for Confounding in Test-Negative Design COVID-19 Effectiveness Studies: Simulation Study. JMIR Formative Research. 〔模擬比較 TND 疫苗效力研究的干擾調整方法。〕
  • Andrews, N., et al. (2025). Evaluating the Test-Negative Design for COVID-19 Vaccine Effectiveness Using Randomized Trial Data. JAMA Network Open. 〔以隨機試驗資料驗證陰性對照設計效度。〕
  • Jiang, C., Talbot, D., Carazo, S., & Schnitzer, M. E. (2025). A double machine learning approach for the evaluation of COVID-19 vaccine effectiveness under the test-negative design. Statistics in Medicine, 44. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.10384. 〔以雙重機器學習估計陰性對照設計下的疫苗效力。〕
